## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between GrowthX and Homebase teams to discuss content updates, SEO tools, and AI-generated content improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ongoing website migration is progressing smoothly, with launch expected in November](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Two AI tools under consideration: general small business management AI and AI-enhanced salary calculator](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Existing hourly salary calculator page identified as high-potential for optimization and traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [AI-generated content improvements needed in audience positioning, internal linking, CTAs, and keyword usage](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Refreshes

  - [10 articles to be published this week to make up for previous delays](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [AI struggling with section selection; human evaluation now implemented for better results](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [SEO checker tool in development to automate content evaluation process](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### AI Tools and Calculators

  - [Considering two AI tools: general small business management AI and AI-enhanced salary calculator](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - Existing hourly salary calculator page (<https://joinhomebase.com/calculators/hourly-to-salary/>) identified as high-potential for optimization
  - [Hybrid approach proposed: traditional calculator fields with AI processing in the background](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Timeline for tool development to be discussed in follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)

### AI-Generated Content Improvements

  - [Audience positioning needs refinement (e.g., avoid phrases like "diligent mid-career professional")](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Internal linking requires improvement in anchor text relevance and placement](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [Missing conclusions and CTAs in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
  - [Primary keyword usage needs optimization to avoid keyword stuffing in headers](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)

### SEO Insights

  - [ADP calculator uses an iframe, contradicting earlier concerns about Google recognition](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [ADP no-indexes their footer to prioritize internal linking and crawl budget](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to provide timelines for AI tool development options](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

  - [Kerry to add writing refresh for hourly salary calculator page to to-do list](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

      - [Refine audience targeting parameters](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [Improve internal linking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)

      - [Optimize keyword usage in headers and content](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)
  - [Victoria to continue editing and providing feedback on AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/PmS38e41o1itfw7aftfA1FsvXHBQCHKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
